query:
SELECT 
  oc.id, oc.name, oc.userId, oc.lastSyncAt, oc.dailySyncsUsed, oc.dailySyncsResetAt, oc.leadsFound,
  u.plan, u.subscriptionStatus, u.trialEndsAt
FROM outreach_campaigns oc
JOIN users u ON oc.userId = u.id;
command:
